description: Display Cursor AI usage in the sidebar: model, tokens, requests, and costs
config.title: Cursor Usage Monitor
config.displayCount: Number of recent usage entries to display in sidebar (default: 5)
config.pollingInterval: Polling interval in seconds during AI response (default: 3s)
config.idleInterval: Idle polling interval in seconds when no AI activity (default: 60s)
config.showTokenDetail: Show token input/output breakdown for each usage entry
config.sessionToken: Manually set Cursor Session Token (format: userId%3A%3AaccessToken). Leave empty for automatic detection
config.alertEnabled: Enable usage change alerts (popup notification when monitored values exceed thresholds)
config.alertItems: List of items to monitor: newSession, includedRequests, onDemandSpending, totalTokens
config.alertThreshold.newSession: Alert when this many new AI sessions are detected (default: 1)
config.alertThreshold.includedRequests: Alert when Included Requests increase by this amount (default: 10)
config.alertThreshold.onDemandSpending: Alert when On-Demand spending increases by this amount in dollars (default: 1.0)
config.alertThreshold.totalTokens: Alert when total token consumption increases by this amount (default: 100000)
config.hiddenItems: Items hidden from the sidebar tree view (includedRequests, onDemandUsage)
config.statusBarItems: Items pinned to the bottom status bar (includedRequests, onDemandUsage)
